basic_details.job_title: GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 64 Senior Resident, CMO and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh (GMCH Chandigarh)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident / CMO / Resident Anaesthetist / Resident Pathologist
basic_details.short_information: Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh (GMCH Chandigarh) Senior Resident / CMO / Resident Anaesthetist / Resident Pathologist Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website of GMCH Chandigarh. A total of 64 vacancies have been announced through the GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable: 5 years for Govt. Servants applied through proper channel; 10 years for widows/deserted women and women judicially separated from their Husbands who are not remarried.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Medical Degree i.e. (M.D./M.S./DNB/M.Ch./D.M) OR equivalent in the concerned specialty (recognized by MCI and registered either with Medical Council of India or State Medical Council)
qualification.details: Postgraduate Medical Degree i.e. (M.D./M.S./DNB/M.Ch./D.M) OR equivalent in the concerned specialty (recognized by MCI and registered either with Medical Council of India or State Medical Council).

salary_details.details: Rs. 67,700/- Per Month (minimum pay 1st Cell of Level-11) + NPA @ 20%

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by GMCH Chandigarh?
faq.answer: GMCH Chandigarh has announced a total of 64 vacancies for the posts of Senior Resident / CMO / Resident Anaesthetist / Resident Pathologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a Postgraduate Medical Degree i.e. (M.D./M.S./DNB/M.Ch./D.M) OR equivalent in the concerned specialty, recognized by MCI and registered with the Medical Council of India or State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67,700/- Per Month, along with NPA @ 20%.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the walk-in interview with all required documents on the specified date and time.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories. This fee is payable at the time of the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh. The exact venue details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for GMCH Chandigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.
